title: DISCOVERY 2 — COUNTING floors
prompt: Wide shot in @dream-house. The three-floor pink Dream House fills the frame center-back. @Sara on the LEFT points upward at each floor as she counts. @Eva on the RIGHT watches in awe. Sara (pointing each floor): "One floor… two floors… THREE floors!" Sara (turning to Eva, excited): "It has THREE whole floors!" Eva (eyes huge): "THREE?!" Bright morning light.
